title: Hawking Frontier Atlas Observation Record
description: Cross-scale memory (goal Part 35). ONE JSONL line per sealed frontier observation. Binds a physical-quantization measurement to (parent x revision x architecture x scale x organ x layer x expert x representation x rate x doctor x backend x source_precision) and its measured cost and quality, tagged by evidence_level so provisional proxies are never confused with verified capability passes. Records are append-only observations, never champions: promotion to a WIN requires a capability_pass=true observation at F4 or higher. The atlas is a ledger of what was measured, not a ranking of what is best.

parent.description: Source model identity, family-level (e.g. 'gpt-oss-120b', 'deepseek-v3.2-685b', 'kimi-k2.6-1t'). The parent an observation was drawn from.

revision.description: Exact frozen source revision the observation binds to, e.g. 'openai/gpt-oss-120b @ b5c939de'. Pins reproducibility to a specific weight commit.

architecture_family.description: Structural family. Cross-scale comparisons are only valid within a family; the atlas records it so a reader never averages an MoE expert against a dense projection.

scale.description: Parameter scale label of the parent, e.g. '120b', '685b', '1t', '1.6t'. Free-form label, not a resident-footprint claim.

tensor_organ.description: Which structural organ the observation is measured over. 'whole-artifact' = the complete assembled candidate; otherwise a tensor class such as 'expert_mlp1' (up/gate proj), 'expert_mlp2' (down proj), 'attn_qkv', 'attn_o', 'router', 'embed', 'lm_head'.

layer.description: 0-indexed layer the observation is scoped to, or null when the observation spans all layers (whole-artifact or per-tensor-class representative).

expert.description: 0-indexed expert index the observation is scoped to, or null when it spans all experts or the parent is not MoE.

representation.description: The quantization / coding family applied, e.g. 'PQ' (product_quant), 'transform_pq', 'pq_doctor_lowrank', 'pq_protected_islands', 'naive_rvq', 'repairability_shaped', 'ternary', 'mxfp4'.

rate.description: Realized coding rate in bits-per-weight (BPW). For whole-artifact records this is the exact whole-artifact BPW including all overhead; for organ records it is the per-organ realized BPW. null when not applicable.

doctor.description: Recovery / repair mechanism reserved or applied. e.g. 'reserve-only', 'lowrank', 'protected_islands_reserve', 'qat', 'kd', or null for none. Doctor spend is already included in 'rate'.

backend.description: Compute backend the observation was produced on, e.g. 'apple/mps', 'apple', 'metal', 'cpu', 'cuda'. Backend parity is not assumed; the atlas records which lane a number came from.

source_precision.description: Native precision of the source weights the observation quantizes from, e.g. 'mxfp4', 'bf16', 'f16', 'fp8'.

physical_bytes.description: Realized physical size in bytes of the coded artifact/organ (byte-equivalent, floor of physical_bits/8). null when not separately accounted at organ granularity. Use physical_bits for the exact bit-packed count.

physical_bits.description: Exact bit-packed physical size in bits. Authoritative for sub-byte accounting; physical_bytes is the byte-rounded convenience view.

quality_metrics.description: Measured quality. Whether a record is a pass is governed ONLY by capability_pass together with evidence_level; divergence/error fields are diagnostic. All divergence/error means are dimensionless in [0,1].

capability_pass.description: True only for a real functional-quality contract pass. Proxy observations set this false or null.

capability_parity.description: True only when measured against a verified full-precision parity reference at adequate sample. Proxy/synthetic-activation observations are false.

true_residual_output_divergence_mean.description: Mean output divergence measured with the true residual (not a synthetic-activation proxy).

functional_divergence.description: Functional / output-space divergence for this observation. On proxy records this is a synthetic-activation PROXY, not a verified capability metric.

budget_bpw.description: Declared BPW budget the observation was held under.

within_budget.description: Whether every accounted row landed within budget.

proxy.description: Named proxy method when the quality is not a verified capability measurement, e.g. 'synthetic-activation output-divergence'.

sample_note.description: Sampling caveat, e.g. 'small n_inputs; DIRECTIONAL geometry science, not a verified capability pass'.

runtime.description: Measured runtime (decode/prefill tok/s, wall time). null when not measured for this observation.

memory.description: Measured memory footprint (resident GiB, peak). null when not measured.

energy.description: Measured energy (J/tok, watts). null when not measured (clean-room energy still queued per house rules).

evidence_level.description: Confidence tier. F0=declared plan only. F1=bounded proxy (single-run synthetic-activation, small n). F2=reproduced proxy (replayed/independent). F3=provisional (complete artifact + exact accounting, quality resolved but NEGATIVE at contract). F4=capability measured against a real forward/eval. F5=adversarially verified capability pass. Only F4+ with capability_pass=true may be cited as a WIN or Event Horizon.

provenance.description: Where the observation was sealed: source report path(s), row_id, controller identity, sha256 of the sealing artifact.
